summary: Comprehensive testing of Dynamic Escrow Intelligence with GPT-5.2 AI extraction feature. Backend: 8/9 tests passed (89%), 1 transient 502 error. Frontend: All UI elements verified including file upload zone, AI/Demo extract buttons, conditions list with AI confidence scores, verify buttons, progress bar, and full escrow lifecycle.

minor.issue: Transient 502 error during test (network issue, not code bug)

seed_data_creation: Created test escrows: TEST_GPT52_AI_Extraction ($600,000), TEST_Demo_Extraction_Only ($400,000), TEST_Draft_For_Upload ($300,000)
context_for_next_testing_agent: GPT-5.2 AI extraction feature fully tested and working. When file is uploaded via multipart/form-data, returns ai_powered=True with real AI-extracted conditions (variable count based on contract). When no file provided (JSON body), returns ai_powered=False with 6 demo conditions. MOCKED: Stripe deposits, HTS tokens, HCS settlement are still mocked.

mocked_apis.Hedera HCS Settlement: Returns simulated transaction with topic ID and sequence number
mocked_apis.AI Extraction: REAL - Uses GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations when file is uploaded

ai_extraction.test_create_escrow_for_ai_test: PASS - Created escrow for AI testing
ai_extraction.test_ai_extraction_with_txt_file: PASS - Extracted conditions with ai_powered=True, ai_model=gpt-5.2

demo_extraction.test_create_escrow_for_demo_test: PASS - Created escrow for demo testing

key_findings.ai_extraction_working: GPT-5.2 AI extraction is REAL and working. Extracted 18 conditions from test contract with confidence scores.
key_findings.demo_fallback_working: Demo extraction returns 6 fixed real estate conditions when no file provided.
key_findings.file_upload_ui: Upload zone visible in draft status, shows filename when file selected, button changes to 'AI Extract (GPT-5.2)'
